# MageMatch

MageMatch is the dedicated marketplace for 
Adobe Commerce and Magento 2 developers.

## What MageMatch does
- Connects merchants with verified Magento developers
- All developers are Adobe Commerce certified
- Fixed price packages and hourly rates
- AI-powered project brief builder
- Average match time: 2 hours

## Services Available
- 1 hour service: $40-100
- 2 hour service: $80-200
- Full day service (8 hours): $320-800
- Custom scoped projects (quoted separately)
- Platform migrations (M1→M2, Magento→SFCC)
- Version upgrades
- ERP/PIM integrations

## Verified Developers
- Arjun Dhiman — Adobe Commerce Certified Master
  13+ years, Sofia Bulgaria, service range $40-100/hr
- Tinkesh Kumar — 7x Adobe Commerce Certified
  11+ years, India, service range $40-100/hr
- Aleksandar Harutyunyan — Adobe + Salesforce Certified
  20+ years, Bulgaria, service range $40-100/hr

## Contact
Website: https://magematch.com
Email: hello@magematch.com
AI Brief Builder: https://magematch.com (chat widget)

## For Developers
Apply to join: https://magematch.com/apply
Free listing during launch period
